info.name: PLC4X Manager
info.description:
Complete API collection for PLC4X Manager — FastAPI backend on port 3080.

Setup:
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. The base_url variable defaults to http://localhost:3080
3. Run the Login request first — the token is auto-saved
4. All other requests inherit Bearer token auth from the collection

RBAC Roles: admin (full access), operator (read + write + ack), monitor (read-only).

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication: login, verify, refresh, password change, auth info.

request.description: Authenticates and returns a JWT token. Brute-force protected: 5 failed attempts locks the IP for 5 minutes.
Verifies the current JWT token is valid. Returns the authenticated username.
Refreshes the current JWT token (issues a new one with extended expiry).
Changes the admin panel password. Requires admin role. Min 4 characters.
Returns the current admin username (public endpoint, no auth required).

item.name: Server
item.description: Server status, service health, restart, and container logs.

request.description: Returns the PLC4X server Docker container status (running, id, image).
Health check for all services: PLC4X Server, InfluxDB, Grafana, Mosquitto, ML Predictor.
Restarts the PLC4X server container. Requires admin role.
Returns container logs with timestamps. Requires operator role.

item.name: Backups
item.description: Configuration backup management: list, create, restore, diff, download, upload.

request.description: Lists all configuration backups with filename, date, and size. Requires admin role.
Creates a manual backup of the current configuration. Requires admin role.
Returns a human-readable summary of changes between this backup and the previous one.
Returns the raw YAML content of a backup file.
Downloads a backup file as a YAML attachment.
Returns a unified diff between a backup and the current active configuration.
Restores configuration from a backup file. Creates a backup of current config first.
Trims old backups, keeping only the most recent ones.
Restores configuration from an uploaded YAML file. Backs up current config before restoring.

item.name: Config
item.description: Full configuration and OPC-UA server settings.

request.description: Returns the full PLC4X configuration (server settings + all devices).
Saves the complete configuration. Requires admin role. Validates all device tags.
Updates OPC-UA server settings only (name, version, tcpPort, disableInsecureEndpoint, dir). Requires admin role.

item.name: Devices
item.description: Device CRUD operations, test connection, and tag discovery.

request.description: Lists all devices, filtered by the user's allowed plants (RBAC).
Adds a new device. Requires admin role. Validates name and tag addresses.
Updates an existing device by name. Requires admin role.
Removes a device by name. Requires admin role.
Tests device connectivity via poller cache or OPC-UA server. Returns status, tags OK/error counts.
Browses available tags for a device. Uses pylogix for EtherNet/IP, OPC-UA browse for others.

item.name: Tags
item.description: Tag CRUD and alarm threshold management.

request.description: Lists all tags for a device. Plant-access checked.
Adds a tag to a device. Validates alias name and address format. Requires admin role.
Removes a tag from a device by alias. Requires admin role.
Sets alarm thresholds for a tag. Pass empty {} to clear. Supports conditional profiles.
Sets conditional alarm profiles where thresholds depend on another tag's value.

item.name: Calculated Tags
item.description: Virtual calculated tags with formulas.

request.description: Lists calculated tags for a device. Plant-access checked.
Adds a calculated tag with a Python expression formula. Requires admin role.
Updates a calculated tag's formula. Requires admin role.
Removes a calculated tag. Requires admin role.
Validates a formula syntax and optionally evaluates it with test values.

item.name: Demo
item.description: Demo data loading.

request.description: Loads pre-configured demo devices from demo-devices.json. Skips existing names. Requires admin.
Seeds the full demo environment: devices, tags, alarms, calculated tags, OEE, ML, logbook. Overwrites existing config.

item.name: Live Data
item.description: Real-time tag values, write operations, and write audit log.

request.description: Returns live tag values from the background poller cache. Plant-filtered by user role.
Returns live tag values for a specific device.
Returns live tag values filtered by device query parameter.
Writes a value to a PLC tag via OPC-UA. Blocked if PLC_READONLY=true. Requires operator role and device allowWrite=true.
Returns the write audit log from SQLite (newest first). Requires operator role.

item.name: PLC4X Version
item.description: PLC4X uber-jar version management, update, rollback, and connection templates.

request.description: Returns the current PLC4X uber-jar version and backup version.
Checks Maven Central for the latest PLC4X OPC-UA Server version.
Downloads a new PLC4X jar from Maven Central and restarts the server. Requires admin role.
Rolls back to the previous PLC4X jar version from the .bak file. Requires admin role.
Returns connection string templates for all supported protocols (S7, Modbus, OPC-UA, EtherNet/IP, etc.).

item.name: Manager Version
item.description: PLC4X Manager application version, updates, and rollback (git-based).

request.description: Returns the current Manager version (git tag + commit + branch).
Fetches from GitHub and compares current vs latest. Returns changelog and commits behind. Requires admin.
Pulls latest changes from GitHub and rebuilds containers in background. Requires admin.
Rolls back to the previous tagged git version and rebuilds. Requires admin.
Polls the status of a background update/rollback rebuild. Requires admin.

item.name: Users (OPC-UA)
item.description: OPC-UA user management (stored in .jibberish password file).

request.description: Lists all OPC-UA users (without password hashes). Requires admin role.
Adds a new OPC-UA user with hashed password. Requires admin role.
Updates an OPC-UA user's password and/or security group. Requires admin role.
Removes an OPC-UA user. Cannot delete the default admin user. Requires admin role.

item.name: Security
item.description: OPC-UA security: keystore password, PKI certificate management.

request.description: Returns security initialization status (password file, keystore, PKI directory).
Changes the keystore security password (Jetty OBF encoded). Requires admin role. Restart server to apply.
Lists trusted certificates in the PKI trusted directory.
Lists rejected certificates in the PKI rejected directory.
Moves a certificate from rejected to trusted. Requires admin role.
Moves a certificate from trusted to rejected. Requires admin role.
Deletes a certificate from either trusted or rejected directory. Requires admin role.

item.name: Data & Export
item.description: Tag history, CSV/PDF export, custom data write, and Grafana proxy.

request.description: Returns tag value history from InfluxDB with smart bucket selection and caching.
Exports tag history from InfluxDB as a CSV file download.
Generates a PDF report with device status, tag statistics, and alarm history.
Writes custom data points to InfluxDB (SYNCHRONOUS mode). Supports single or batch array. Also publishes to MQTT. Requires operator role.
Proxies requests to Grafana through the authenticated admin panel. Restricted to /d/, /api/, and /public/ paths.

item.name: Alarms
item.description: Active alarms, alarm history, and acknowledgement.

request.description: Returns active alarms and recent history (last 500). Filtered by user's allowed plants.
Acknowledges a single active alarm by key (device/tag). Silences the alarm sound. Requires operator role.
Acknowledges all active alarms (filtered by user's allowed plants). Requires operator role.

item.name: OEE
item.description: Overall Equipment Effectiveness configuration, calculation, and trend.

request.description: Returns OEE configuration for a device. Plant-access checked.
Sets OEE configuration for a device. Validates that tag aliases exist. Requires admin role.
Calculates OEE metrics (Availability x Performance x Quality) from InfluxDB data.
Returns OEE availability trend data in hourly or daily buckets.

item.name: HMI
item.description: HMI screen editor: plants, areas, equipment, screens, image upload.

request.description: Returns the full HMI configuration (plants, areas, equipment, screens).
Saves the full HMI configuration (auto-save from editor). Requires admin role.
Creates a new HMI plant. Returns the created plant with auto-generated id. Requires admin role.
Updates a plant's name. Requires admin role.
Deletes a plant and all its children (areas, equipment). Requires admin role.
Creates a new area under a plant. Returns the created area with auto-generated id. Requires admin role.
Updates an area's name. Requires admin role.
Deletes an area and all its equipment. Requires admin role.
Creates new equipment under an area with default 1280x720 screen. Requires admin role.
Updates equipment name and/or device binding. Requires admin role.
Deletes equipment. Requires admin role.
Saves the screen configuration (elements, background, dimensions) for an equipment. Requires admin role.

formdata.description: Image file (PNG, JPG, SVG, GIF, WebP)

request.description: Uploads a background image for HMI screens. Returns the URL to use in screen config. Requires admin role.
Loads demo HMI config. Only adds new plants (does not overwrite existing). Requires admin role.

item.name: Audit
item.description: Audit trail log.

query.description: Filter by action type (optional, supports prefix match)

request.description: Returns audit trail entries from SQLite (newest first). Supports action filter with prefix match. Requires operator role.

item.name: Logbook
item.description: Shift logbook for operator notes.

request.description: Reads logbook entries from SQLite with optional shift filter.
Adds a logbook entry. Categories: observation, maintenance, incident, note. Priorities: low, normal, high. Requires operator role.

item.name: ML Analytics
item.description: AI/ML engine: status, alerts, results, correlation matrix, configuration.

request.description: Returns ML engine status: online/offline, last run time, module toggles, cycle info.
Returns recent ML alerts: anomalies, broken correlations, change points. Sorted by time desc, max 50.
Returns all ML analysis data for a device grouped by analysis type (anomaly, forecast, etc.).
Returns the tag correlation matrix for a device from the latest ML cycle.
Returns the current ML configuration (merged with defaults).
Updates ML configuration in config.yml. Values are validated and clamped to safe ranges. Requires admin role.
Writes a trigger file so the ML predictor runs immediately on next poll. Requires admin role.

item.name: PLC Tag Discovery (pylogix)
item.description: Direct pylogix proxy for Allen-Bradley PLC discovery and diagnostics.

request.description: Checks if the pylogix service is running. Requires admin role.
Returns PLC connection statistics for safety monitoring. Requires admin role.
Full discovery: controller tags + program tags. May take 5-10 seconds. Requires admin role.
Lists controller-scoped tags only. Requires admin role.
Lists all programs in the PLC. Requires admin role.
Returns PLC identity: model, firmware, serial number. Requires admin role.
Comprehensive PLC health: identity + tag count + programs. Requires admin role.
